response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the video as a promotional skit for the Hololive English -Justice- 2nd anniversary merchandise. 2. 00:00-01:25: Skit with dialogue. 3. 01:26-04:32: Musical skit/song performance by Raora Panthera. Searched for song title, no direct match found, likely an original skit song. Transcribed lyrics from video. 4. 04:33-05:00: Merchandise promotion.
response.global_summary: This video is a promotional skit featuring the Hololive English -Justice- members, announcing their 2nd Anniversary merchandise. It features a musical skit with the characters and a commercial segment at the end.

scenes.description: The four characters are in a car, engaging in a dialogue-heavy skit.
The character Raora Panthera performs a dramatic song while the other members are in a field. This appears to be an original musical skit.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Those two are away with the fairies
Cecilia, do you have any updates on the suspects location?
Did I fail them as a mother?
My heart breaks as their big sister
I've done everything in my power to look after those three
Those three wild eccentric little sisters
And guide them to this very day
I gave them my all
Oh, what did I do to deserve such cruelty?
Where did I go wrong?
Where did my guidance stray away from the path?

(Dialogue/Singing continues in character)

Happy as the love of time
Justice, just like that

(More dialogue)

Because of you, I missed out on unlimited editions of Satini and I didn't even get to eat my delicious pizza!

(More dialogue)

Cucumber pizza?

(More dialogue)

It's to die for!

(More dialogue)

Impossible!

(More dialogue)

Doom... Doom... Doom... Doom!

scenes.description: The characters introduce the 2nd Anniversary merchandise, including an acrylic message board.
